required_complexity_patterns.notes: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers

How did you hear about us?

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Reference DOM (React phone dial code only): react-phone-number-input style: separate dial code combobox and national number Reference DOM (Title attribute tooltip label): Field identified primarily via title attribute on input with minimal label Reference DOM (Other option reveal): Referral source Other checkbox reveals free-text input Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: custom-combobox, div-role-textbox, pill-yes-no, aria-labelledby-hidden, split-phone. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: React phone dial code only; Title attribute tooltip label; Other option reveal.
